description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow to package mc_rtc. The workflow should trigger on repository dispatches with types package-master and package-release, on push to tags matching v*, and on pull requests to any branch except when pushing to specific paths. The workflow should have three jobs: check-tag, build-packages, and upload-packages. The check-tag job checks version coherency for tags and creates a release. The build-packages job builds packages for multiple ROS distributions and architectures. The upload-packages job uploads packages to Bintray. A final job, mirror-sync-and-trigger, synchronizes the Bintray mirror and triggers dependent repositories to rebuild.
